summary: Clean matrix‑board recording captures a nostalgic St. Pete show with a standout Crazy Fingers performance.
review: The partial set delivers a nicely balanced matrix sound that many reviewers describe as clean and well‑mixed, giving listeners a clear window into the 1980s St. Pete gig. While several fans praise the overall vibe and highlight the memorable Crazy Fingers jam, other comments focus on site‑download frustrations rather than musical quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Most substantive reviews rate the performance and recording between 4–5 stars, indicating a strong show with good sound; occasional low‑star complaints relate to download issues rather than audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a matrix board source with nice, clean, well‑mixed sound; no major distortion or dropouts noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set sequencing; reviewers focus on overall atmosphere and specific song highlights.
